data.title: Palantir Adds Elon Musk's AI Chatbot Grok To AIP
data.description: Palantir announced on Thursday that it has added xAI's large language model Grok to its AIP platform.

data.title: Thomson Reuters Q4 Earnings: Beats Estimates, Boosts Dividend 10%, CEO Highlights Strategic Growth
data.description: Thomson Reuters Corp reported 5% revenue growth in fiscal Q4 2024 to $1.909 billion, beating analyst estimates. Stock price increased after the report.

data.title: What's Going On With Ford Stock Thursday?
data.description: Ford shares are trading lower on Thursday after the company reported mixed 2024 fiscal-year fourth-quarter earnings.

data.title: Uber Posts Robust Q4 Bookings: Analysts Weigh In On Autonomous Vehicle Threat
data.description: Uber's stock rose despite earnings miss. Analysts are encouraged by strong fundamentals and AV market potential.

data.title: Shiba Inu More Than A Meme? The 'Technology Powerhouse' Partners With United Arab Emirates Government
data.description: Cryptocurrency traders hope Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) may be poised for a comeback off the back of a partnership announcement with the government of the United Arab Emirates.
